title: The Metriq paper is on arXiv! 🗞️
body: Metriq: A Collaborative Platform for Benchmarking Quantum Computers is now available on arXiv.

title: metriq-gym 0.7.0 released
body: New version of metriq-gym now available with improvements to CLOPS and EPLG, and more support for Quantinuum devices.

title: Platforms view now default
body: The app now opens on Platforms by default, with score bars for quick comparison.

title: More data sources
body: New devices and fresh benchmark runs were added to the dataset. Check back often as coverage expands.
